name: Conveyancing Intake (SA)
description: Intake questionnaire for South African conveyancing matters — captures party identity and contact details, property description, purchase price and bond terms, occupation dates, FICA uploads, marital status, and rates/levy account contacts.

items.name: Party Identity & Contact Details
items.description: Full names, ID or passport numbers, residential addresses, email, and telephone numbers for each purchaser, seller, and (if applicable) spouse or juristic representative.

items.name: Property Address, Erf & Deeds Office
items.description: Full property address, erf number (and township / sectional scheme details where applicable), and the Deeds Office with jurisdiction over the property.

items.name: Purchase Price, Bond Amount & Bond Institution
items.description: Agreed purchase price (ZAR), bond amount applied for (if any), and the name of the bond granting institution. Include the bond reference or application number if already assigned.

items.name: Occupation & Possession Dates
items.description: Intended date of occupation, date of possession, and any occupational rental arrangement prior to registration of transfer.

items.name: FICA Documentation
items.description: FICA-compliant supporting documents for each party: certified copy of ID or passport, proof of residential address not older than 3 months, and (for juristic persons) registration documents and resolution authorising the transaction.

items.name: Marital Status (ANC / In Community of Property)
items.description: Current marital status of each party and, if married, whether married in community of property, out of community with or without accrual, or under foreign law. Attach a copy of the antenuptial contract if applicable.

items.name: Rates & Levy Account Contacts
items.description: Municipal account number for rates, and (if applicable) the managing agent / body corporate contact details for the levy clearance figures.
